data.name: Rustomjee BigQuery Category - Booking- 1 - within first 30 days from the site visit copy

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  ID,
  today_delta_additions,
  KUNNR AS customer_id,
  COALESCE(Account_Mobile_Number__c, Account_Mobile_1__c, Mobile_Number__c, PrimaryMobileNumber__c) AS customer_mobile,
  CONCAT(First_Name__c, ' ', Last_Name__c) AS customer_name,
  Booking_Date,
  SV_Date__c,
  Opportunity_ID__c,
  X18_Digit_Booking_ID__c,
  Project_Text__c,
  Agreement_Value__c
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_booking`
WHERE Booking_Date IS NOT NULL
  AND SV_Date__c IS NOT NULL
  AND Status__c = 'Processed'
  AND COALESCE(
        Account_Mobile_Number__c,
        Account_Mobile_1__c,
        Mobile_Number__c,
        PrimaryMobileNumber__c
      ) IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    
    -- Condition 1:
    -- Agreement Value >= 5 Crore
    -- Booking within 30 days of Site Visit
    (
      SAFE_CAST(Agreement_Value__c AS NUMERIC) >= 50000000
      AND DATE_DIFF(
            DATE(Booking_Date),
            DATE(SV_Date__c),
            DAY
          ) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
    )

    OR

    -- Condition 2:
    -- Agreement Value < 5 Crore
    -- Booking within 15 days of Site Visit
    (
      SAFE_CAST(Agreement_Value__c AS NUMERIC) < 50000000
      AND DATE_DIFF(
            DATE(Booking_Date),
            DATE(SV_Date__c),
            DAY
          ) BETWEEN 0 AND 15
    )

  )

nodes.name: Query to fetch details of person done booking within first 30 days from the site visit

  "booking_date": "2024-06-20 13:20:00",
  "sv_date": "2024-05-29",
  "booking_id": "a0POW00000A6oXe2AJ",
  "today_delta_additions": "2026-04-28"
}

parameters.query:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM wallet_transaction_logs
  WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
  AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
  AND status = 'SUCCESS'
);

/* SELECT status
FROM wallet_transaction_logs
WHERE customer_code = '{{$json.customer_code}}'
AND remarks = '{{$json.remarks}}'
AND status = 'SUCCESS'
LIMIT 1; */

assignments.name: customer_code
assignments.value: ={{$node["Streamline data for booking done within 30 days of the site visit2"].json.customer_code}}

assignments.name: remarks
assignments.value: ={{$node["Streamline data for booking done within 30 days of the site visit2"].json.remarks}}

assignments.name: =reference_id

assignments.name: transaction_note

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wallet_transaction_logs (
    customer_code,
    amount,
    remarks,
    reference_id,
    transaction_note,
    status,
    status_code,
    message,
    request_payload,
    response_payload,
    execution_id,
    created_at
)
VALUES (
    {{$json.customer_code}},
    {{$json.amount || 0}},
    '{{($json.remarks || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.reference_id ? `'${$json.reference_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    '{{($json.transaction_note || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{($json.status || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    {{$json.status_code || 500}},
    '{{($json.message || "").replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.request_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    '{{JSON.stringify($json.response_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''")}}'::jsonb,
    {{$json.execution_id ? `'${$json.execution_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
    NOW()
);

nodes.name: Streamline data for booking done within 30 days of the site visit

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  ID,
  today_delta_additions,
  KUNNR AS customer_id,
  COALESCE(Account_Mobile_Number__c, Account_Mobile_1__c, Mobile_Number__c, PrimaryMobileNumber__c) AS customer_mobile,
  CONCAT(First_Name__c, ' ', Last_Name__c) AS customer_name,
  Booking_Date,
  SV_Date__c,
  Opportunity_ID__c,
  X18_Digit_Booking_ID__c,
  Project_Text__c,
  Agreement_Value__c
FROM `powerbi-implementation.dataWarehouse_prod.sales_booking`
WHERE Booking_Date IS NOT NULL
AND SV_Date__c IS NOT NULL
AND Status__c = 'Processed'
AND DATE_DIFF(
      DATE(Booking_Date),
      DATE(SV_Date__c),
      DAY
    ) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
AND COALESCE(Account_Mobile_Number__c, Account_Mobile_1__c, Mobile_Number__c, PrimaryMobileNumber__c) IS NOT NULL
